title: Claude Fable 5 is smarter💡
summary: IBM Technology covers Claude Fable 5, highlighting improvements in planning capabilities, code analysis depth, and inference speed. Chris Hay discusses the upgrades in a Mixture of Experts episode.
writeup: This Mixture of Experts episode from IBM Technology overviews Claude Fable 5, focusing on gains in planning capabilities, code analysis depth, and inference speed. The takeaways center on how stronger planning and deeper code analysis pair with faster inference, with attention to inference costs. The framing situates the model's improvements within practical concerns around planning and code generation.
